title: Header Fields, Representations, Negotiation, Validators, and Caching · Execution Trace: Cache Privacy Vary
summary: Clients send repeated and malformed media fields, the server sniffs content, omits Vary, caches personalized responses, and computes validators from unstable JSON ordering. Planned artifact: Add and verify the httpsgo cache privacy vary increment in representation selection and cache contract. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Design shared and private caching, freshness, revalidation, no-store, stale behavior, invalidation, and Vary without exposing user-specific data.
Generate stable strong or weak validators from the selected representation or resource version and apply comparison semantics correctly.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Go server Predict Cache Privacy Vary · Theory Cache Privacy Vary
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory team handles case 3180 in a civic incident API behind one trusted regional proxy.
